column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Wearing a pale pink kimono, smiling gently" | TEXT="春色ですね" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Wearing a light green kimono, looking fresh" | TEXT="爽やかです" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at kimono sleeve happily" | TEXT="お気に入り" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Twirling lightly to show the kimono" | TEXT="どうですか？" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Adjusting a beautiful pale pink obijime" | TEXT="整えますね" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a light green sensu (folding fan)" | TEXT="あおぎます" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Looking elegant with hands softly restings" | TEXT="美しい" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Pointing to a pale flower pattern" | TEXT="春らしいでしょ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Touching a cherry blossom hairpin" | TEXT="ふうむ"
